race.comment: Wide open and scorching pace expected. SWITCH THE STARS (3) is a progressive type who ran well over a similar trip last time. Drawn to stalk a hot speed and expected to measure up. DIAMANTINA ROSE (1) is in hot form, claiming the last two, the latest at Kilcoy by a space. More weight and tricky draw but has pace and will give a sight. PRESTIGE PAK (8) placed fresh then was well off best last time on a rain-affected track at Grafton. This suits and gets a chance to atone. MR EVANS (11) is going better than the form looks and rates highly on best form. Don't underestimate. BETTERINDANUDE (5) placed only try here and expecting a positive return.
